LegalDisclaimer.and our Legal Disclaimer Otherwise pleas: and our Legal Disclaimer. Otherwise, please do not use our service.
LegalDisclaimer.The information provided here is for inf: The information provided here is for informational purposes only and does not constitute legal, financial, or investment advice. By accessing this website or participating in our platform, you agree to these terms
LegalDisclaimer.The tokens issued by our platform are in: The tokens issued by our platform are intended solely for use within our gamified e-learning environment.
LegalDisclaimer.These tokens have no value at all they h: These tokens have no value at all; they have 0 value and no purpose even if it is mentioned explicitly or implicitly anywhere else in the game, the website, or any other mediums.
LegalDisclaimer.They have no intrinsic or extrinsic valu: They have no intrinsic or extrinsic value and are not financial instruments. They should not be considered as an investment, currency, or anything that has a value.
LegalDisclaimer.Our platform reserves the right to mint: Our platform reserves the right to mint or burn tokens at any time, for any user or for all users, with or without their acknowledgment. Our platform can do this whether it is essential for maintaining the functionality and balance of our system or not. Users acknowledge and accept this condition as part of their participation.
LegalDisclaimer.We reserve the right to rebrand rename o: We reserve the right to rebrand, rename, or cease operations of the website and its related services without notice. The platform may at any time discontinue the use of current tokens, adopt new tokens, or alter the functionality and utility of these tokens without user consent. The platform can change anything and everything at any time, stop working at any time, stop using or issuing the tokens at any time, and destroy (burn) some or all the tokens for some or all the users at any time.
LegalDisclaimer.The tokens are exclusively usable within: The tokens are exclusively usable within the operational context of our platform. If the website or platform ceases operation, these tokens become unusable and possess no utility or value outside of the service.
LegalDisclaimer.Participation in our platform involves r: Participation in our platform involves risks, including but not limited to technical failures, regulatory changes, or alterations to the service framework. Users are encouraged to perform independent due diligence and consult financial advisors as needed.
LegalDisclaimer.Our platform disclaims any liability for: Our platform disclaims any liability for direct or consequential losses resulting from the use of tokens or any alteration, interruption, or discontinuation of the platform’s operation. Users engage with the platform and its tokens entirely at their own risk.
LegalDisclaimer.We operate in compliance with local regu: We operate in compliance with local regulations and strictly adhere to AML (Anti-Money Laundering) and KYC (Know Your Customer) protocols. Users may be required to provide identification to ensure regulatory compliance.
LegalDisclaimer.Personal data is managed in accordance w: Personal data is managed in accordance with applicable data protection laws, including GDPR. Please refer to our Privacy Policy for detailed information.
LegalDisclaimer.By using our platform you confirm that y: By using our platform, you confirm that you are not a citizen or resident of the United States, any European Union member state, or any other jurisdiction where our services might be restricted or subject to specific regulatory oversight. Notably, this includes countries commonly subject to U.S. sanctions such as North Korea, Iran, Syria, Cuba, and Venezuela, among others. This is not an exhaustive list, and it is your responsibility to ascertain that accessing and using our platform complies with all applicable legal or regulatory restrictions in your country of residence. Users from restricted jurisdictions should not attempt to register on or use our services. If you are a resident or citizen of these regions, or any other region where such services are unlawful, you are hereby notified not to use any of our services.
LegalDisclaimer.We reserve the right to update or change: We reserve the right to update or change this disclaimer and our terms of service at any time. Continued site use implies acceptance of these changes.
LegalDisclaimer.For any inquiries or concerns regarding: For any inquiries or concerns regarding these disclaimers, contact us at [contact email/phone number].
LegalDisclaimer.By participating in our platform users a: By participating in our platform, users acknowledge these conditions and the functional limitations of the tokens.

PrivacyPolicy.By using our service you automatically a: By using our service you automatically acknowledge and agree to our Privacy Policy and you acknowledge and agree to our Legal Disclaimer. Otherwise, please do not use our service.
PrivacyPolicy.This Privacy Policy explains how NearGam: This Privacy Policy explains how NearGami ("we", "us", or "our") collects, uses, and shares personal information of users ("you") of our website
PrivacyPolicy.Includes name email address phone number: Includes name, email address, phone number, and other contact details.
PrivacyPolicy.Information about how you use our websit: Information about how you use our website, products, and services.
PrivacyPolicy.Information about your computer or mobil: Information about your computer or mobile device, like IP address, browser type, and operating system.
PrivacyPolicy.To provide operate and maintain our serv: To provide, operate, and maintain our services.
PrivacyPolicy.To improve personalize and expand our se: To improve, personalize, and expand our services.
PrivacyPolicy.To communicate with you either directly: To communicate with you, either directly or through service providers, including for customer service purposes.
PrivacyPolicy.To send you updates and other informatio: To send you updates and other information relating to the service.
PrivacyPolicy.Third-party providers who perform servic: Third-party providers who perform services on our behalf.
PrivacyPolicy.In connection with any merger sale of co: In connection with any merger, sale of company assets, financing, or acquisition of all or a portion of our business.
PrivacyPolicy.To comply with legal obligations protect: To comply with legal obligations, protect our rights, and ensure the safety of our users.
PrivacyPolicy.You have the right to access and correct: You have the right to access and correct your personal information stored by us.
PrivacyPolicy.Receive a copy of your personal data in: Receive a copy of your personal data in a structured, machine-readable format.
PrivacyPolicy.We are currently working on implementing: We are currently working on implementing the ability for you to request the deletion of your personal information. We plan to have this feature available soon. In the meantime, you can contact us at our official media or our social media channels to discuss any concerns regarding your data.
PrivacyPolicy.We implement security measures designed: We implement security measures designed to protect your information from unauthorized access and use.
PrivacyPolicy.Our website uses cookies and similar tra: Our website uses cookies and similar tracking technologies to improve user experience and track website usage.
PrivacyPolicy.Our website may contain links to third-p: Our website may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the privacy practices or the content of those third-party websites.
PrivacyPolicy.We may update this Privacy Policy from t: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.
PrivacyPolicy.If you have any questions about this Pri: If you have any questions about this Privacy Policy, please contact us at official email address or reach out to us at one of our social media accounts.
PrivacyPolicy.For more information please review our: For more information, please review our
